workflow.name: OrchestKit Issue Auto-Triage
workflow.description: Auto-triage new issues: assess complexity, suggest labels/milestone, draft implementation approach.

steps.instruction:
Triage the new issue: {{trigger.issue.title}}

Issue body:
{{trigger.issue.body}}

1. **Complexity Assessment** (1-5 scale):
   - Level 1 (Trivial): < 50 LOC, 1 file, < 30 min
   - Level 2 (Simple): 50-200 LOC, 1-3 files, 30 min - 2 hr
   - Level 3 (Moderate): 200-500 LOC, 3-10 files, 2-8 hr
   - Level 4 (Complex): 500-1500 LOC, 10-25 files, 8-24 hr
   - Level 5 (Very Complex): 1500+ LOC, 25+ files, 24+ hr

2. **Suggest Labels** from: bug, enhancement, hooks, skills, agents, security, performance, dx, testing, eval, quality, memory

3. **Suggest Milestone** from active milestones:
   - M105: Telemetry Provider Architecture
   - M104: CC Internals Integration
   - M102: CC 2.1.89 Integration
   - M97: Memory System Hardening
   - M95: Docs Site Overhaul
   - M88: Eval Platform
   - M74: Analytics & Observability

4. **Identify Affected Areas** — which directories/files would change

5. **Draft Implementation** — 3-5 bullet approach

6. **Find Related Issues** — search for similar open issues

Post as issue comment with the structured triage format.
